title: AgentManager: Never miss a Claude Code session waiting for your input | Product Hunt
excerpt: A floating macOS window for every Claude Code session. The moment one needs your input, it surfaces — and hides when all is clear. Jump to the exact terminal in one click. Native Swift, notarized, 7-day free trial.
content_html: A floating macOS window for every Claude Code session. The moment one needs your input, it surfaces — and hides when all is clear. Jump to the exact terminal in one click. Native Swift, notarized, 7-day free trial.
